overview.zh: 泰国位于东南亚中南半岛中部，是一个以佛教文化为主的国家，风光秀丽、旅游资源丰富。经济以农业、制造业和旅游业为支柱，稻米出口和热带水果闻名于世，享有'微笑之国'的美誉。
overview.en: Thailand lies in the center of mainland Southeast Asia, a predominantly Buddhist country with beautiful scenery and abundant tourism resources. Its economy rests on agriculture, manufacturing and tourism; famed for rice exports and tropical fruit, it is often called the 'Land of Smiles'.

capitalHistory.zh: 首都曼谷于1782年由却克里王朝的拉玛一世定为都城，逐渐发展为泰国的政治、经济与文化中心。
capitalHistory.en: The capital Bangkok was established as the seat of the Chakri dynasty by King Rama I in 1782 and grew into Thailand's political, economic and cultural center.

climate.zh: 属热带季风气候，全年高温，分为热季、雨季和凉季三季。
climate.en: A tropical monsoon climate with high temperatures year-round, divided into hot, rainy and cool seasons.

note.zh: 由披耶纳·帕迪蓬松作曲、銮沙鲁泰亚·孔哈拉作词，1939年定为国歌，每天两次在公共场所播放。
note.en: Music by Phra Chenduriyang with lyrics by Luang Saranupraphan; adopted in 1939 and played twice daily in public spaces.

note.zh: 男足为东南亚传统强队，多次夺得东南亚锦标赛冠军，尚未打进世界杯正赛。
note.en: The men's team is a Southeast Asian powerhouse with multiple regional championship titles, though it has yet to qualify for the World Cup.

colorNotes.zh: 传统上一周七天各有代表色（如周一黄、周五蓝），黄色和蓝色与王室相关联，广受尊崇。
colorNotes.en: Traditionally each day of the week has a color (e.g., yellow for Monday, blue for Friday); yellow and blue are associated with the monarchy and highly esteemed.

colorNotes.zh: 黑色多用于丧葬场合，喜庆场合应谨慎使用。
colorNotes.en: Black is used for mourning and should be applied cautiously in festive contexts.

culturalTaboos.zh: 头部被视为神圣，不可随意触碰他人头部；脚被视为不洁，不可用脚指人或指物。
culturalTaboos.en: The head is considered sacred and should not be touched; feet are considered unclean and must not point at people or objects.

culturalTaboos.zh: 对王室与佛教应保持尊重，相关内容需谨慎处理。
culturalTaboos.en: Show respect toward the monarchy and Buddhism; handle related content with care.

formatting.zh: 泰文不使用空格分词，需借助断词算法处理换行与排版。
formatting.en: Thai does not use spaces between words, so line-breaking and layout require word-segmentation algorithms.

formatting.zh: 官方常用佛历纪年（比公历早543年），需与公历做转换。
formatting.en: The Buddhist Era calendar (543 years ahead of the Gregorian) is officially common and needs conversion to the Gregorian year.

funFacts.zh: 泰国首都曼谷的全称是世界上最长的城市名称之一。
funFacts.en: The full ceremonial name of Thailand's capital, Bangkok, is one of the longest city names in the world.

funFacts.zh: 宋干节（泼水节）是泰国传统新年，以互相泼水祝福而闻名。
funFacts.en: Songkran, the traditional Thai New Year, is famous for people splashing water on one another as a blessing.

label.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录
